content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Simplero: Executive Assistant Anywhere in the World California Admin, Executive Assistant, and Executive Virtual Assistance All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0081/5989/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles, CA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.simplero.com">http://www.simplero.com</a> </p> <div class="builder-node js-builder-node builder-wysiwyg builder-paragraph builder-node-element node-n_Cc32VNoe1JNvZn7X builder-previewable w-full apply-node-styles node-n_Cc32VNoe1JNvZn7X-apply-node-styles apply-node-styles-padding apply-node-styles-border apply-node-styles-border-radius apply-node-styles-box-shadow"> <div class="node-content js-node-content flex-1 min-w-0 relative"> <div class="breakpoint-container"> <div class="wysiwyg-content"> <p>Full-time. Remote. Pacific Time strongly preferred. Los Angeles county would be a huge bonus so we can be in person when it makes sense.</p> <p><strong>I'm looking for someone who genuinely loves being an Executive Assistant.</strong></p> <p>Someone who gets real satisfaction from bringing order to chaos, building systems that make life easier, and being the person behind the scenes who makes everything run smoothly.</p> <p>When I'm able to stay in my zone of genius because you've already thought three steps ahead, that's a great day for both of us.</p> <p>If your favorite feeling is making other people more effective, keep reading.</p> <h3><strong>The role</strong></h3> <p>You love to move fast. You can handle a lot of ideas being thrown at you and know not to run with every last thing that gets thrown out there. You think. Ask questions. Use judgment.</p> <p>I need someone who enjoys bringing structure to that without slowing it down.</p> <p>Someone who's willing to challenge me when it matters.</p> <p>You'll ask great questions. You'll notice when I'm getting pulled in too many directions. You'll remind me what I said was important. You'll tell me when something doesn't feel aligned or when you think I'm missing something.</p> <p>I'm not looking for someone who just takes orders. I'm looking for a thought partner who helps me stay focused on what matters most.</p> <h3><strong>What you'll actually do</strong></h3> <p>This isn't just about managing my calendar or booking flights.</p> <p>It's about becoming my co-pilot.</p> <p>You'll own the operational and logistical side of my world so I can stay focused on creating, teaching, building, and leading.</p> <p>That includes things like:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Helping run live events and making sure everything is ready before I walk into the room</p> </li> <li> <p>Working with the team to solve problems instead of waiting for someone else to own them</p> </li> <li> <p>Building SOPs, systems, and documentation that make everything run more smoothly</p> </li> <li> <p>Researching whatever needs researching until you know enough to make great decisions</p> </li> <li> <p>Hiring and coordinating contractors and vendors</p> </li> <li> <p>Constantly asking, "How can we make this simpler? Better? Easier?"</p> </li> <li> <p>And yes: managing my calendar, inboxes, travel, and logistics</p> </li> </ul> <p>You're the kind of person who…</p> <ul> <li> <p>sees something that's messy and instinctively starts organizing it.</p> </li> <li> <p>doesn't wait to be asked.</p> </li> <li> <p>don't need a detailed checklist.</p> </li> <li> <p>figure things out.</p> </li> <li> <p>build systems.</p> </li> <li> <p>make things better.</p> </li> <li> <p>love learning. If you don't know something, you teach yourself. AI is your friend.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>ask questions. You experiment. You document what works.</p> </li> </ul> <p>You're confident enough to push back when you think I'm wrong, but humble enough to change your mind when you learn something new.</p> <p>The more you can take off my plate, the more I get to do the work that only I can do.</p> <p>This is a partnership.</p> <p>I want someone who genuinely enjoys being the person behind the scenes making everything work.</p> <p>Someone who gets excited when the machine runs beautifully.</p> <p>Someone who loves helping another person do their best work.</p> <p>If you get energy from making your person more effective, you'll love this role.</p> <p>To apply, record a 60-second video and tell my current EA:</p> <ol> <li> <p>What drew you to this role.</p> </li> <li> <p>Tell me about a time you stepped into chaos and made it run smoothly.</p> </li> <li> <p>Why you'd be an exceptional co-pilot.</p> </li> <li> <p>Your compensation expectations.</p> </li> </ol> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div
